texto: All that I have accomplished ... has been by that plodding patient persevering process of accretion which builds the ant heap particle by particle thought by thought fact by fact.
explicacao: Citação de Elihu Burritt sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “All that I have accomplished ... has been by that plodding patient persevering process of accreti…” articula reflexao, time, particle em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
